text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
2 
ALIVE_MOS 
LABEL: 
Months Alive 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months alive in the reference year. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MBSF/T-MSIS DE file (derived) 
VALUES: 
1–12 
COMMENT: 
CCW creates this variable using MBSF for the Medicare population; for the population with only 
Medicaid, CCW creates this variable from the T-MSIS DE file.
